get.description: Liveness/readiness check: confirms the API and its DB are reachable.

post.description: Exchange an email or username (``username`` field) + password for a JWT access token.

Email a password-reset link. Public.

Always answers 202 with the same message, whether or not the address has an account,
so it cannot be used to discover who is registered.
Set a new password using a token from a reset email. Public; the token is single-use.

Create a new user (role 'user'). Admin-only.

Emails them a welcome message with a link to set their own password; omitting
``password`` makes that link the only way in.

patch.description: Promote/demote or activate/deactivate a user. Admin-only.

get.description: List every roaster, alphabetically. Any authenticated user.

post.description:
Create a roaster with its metadata. Any authenticated user; 409 if the name is taken.

Not required to add a bean — posting a bean with an unknown roaster name creates it.

get.description: Get a roaster by id. Any authenticated user.

patch.description: Edit or rename a roaster (every bean referencing it follows). Admin only.

delete.description: Delete a roaster that has no beans. Admin only; 409 if it is still in use.

post.description: Fold a duplicate into this roaster: its beans move here and it is deleted. Admin only.
Create a bean. It is shared with everyone; you are recorded as its owner.

get.description: List all beans (shared). Use `?mine=true` to return only the beans you own.
Get a bean by id. Any authenticated user may read any bean.

patch.description: Update a bean. Only its owner (or an admin) may edit it.

delete.description: Delete a bean (cascades to its brews and tastings). Owner or admin only.

post.description: Add a lot (a physical bag bought) to a bean; you are recorded as its buyer.

get.description: List a bean's lots (shared). Any authenticated user.
Get a lot by id. Any authenticated user.

patch.description: Update a lot. Only its buyer (or an admin) may edit it.

delete.description: Delete a lot. Only its buyer (or an admin) may delete it.

get.description: List all brew methods. Any authenticated user.

post.description: Create a brew method (shared lookup data). Admin only.

get.description: Get a brew method by id. Any authenticated user.
List all equipment (grinders, machines, kettles…). Any authenticated user.

post.description: Register a piece of equipment (shared lookup data). Admin only.

get.description: Get an equipment item by id. Any authenticated user.

post.description:
Create a brew from any bean; you are recorded as its author.

Extraction yield is computed and stored when only TDS (and beverage mass) is
given. The response includes the computed brew ratio and control-chart diagnostics.

get.description: List the shared brew log. Use `?mine=true` to return only your own brews.
Get a brew by id (any authenticated user), with computed ratio and diagnostics.

patch.description: Update a brew. Only its author (or an admin) may edit it.

delete.description: Delete a brew (cascades to its tastings). Author or admin only.

post.description:
Add a tasting to any brew; you are recorded as its taster.

A brew can be scored by several users, so multiple tastings per brew are allowed.

get.description: List all tastings of a brew (shared). Any authenticated user.
List the shared tasting log. Use `?mine=true` to return only your own tastings.
Get a tasting by id. Any authenticated user.

patch.description: Update a tasting. Only its author (or an admin) may edit it.

delete.description: Delete a tasting. Only its author (or an admin) may delete it.

AuthorRead.title: AuthorRead
AuthorRead.description: Minimal public projection of a user, embedded as the author of a brew or tasting.

tasting_notes_label.title: Tasting Notes Label
tasting_notes_label.description: Tasting notes printed on the bag.

is_finished.title: Is Finished
is_finished.description: Whether the bag is used up.

BeanUpdate.title: BeanUpdate
BeanUpdate.description: All fields optional; only provided fields are applied (PATCH semantics).

lot_id.title: Lot Id
lot_id.description: Optional: the physical lot this brew came from (must belong to the bean).

brewed_at.title: Brewed At
brewed_at.description: When it was brewed (defaults to now).

category.title: Category
category.description: Brewing family the method belongs to.

default_ratio.title: Default Ratio
default_ratio.description: Optional default brew ratio (grams of water per gram of coffee).

lot_id.title: Lot Id
lot_id.description: Optional: the physical lot this brew came from (must belong to the bean).

brewed_at.title: Brewed At
brewed_at.description: When it was brewed (defaults to now).

extraction_yield_percent.title: Extraction Yield Percent
extraction_yield_percent.description: Extraction yield % — computed from TDS, yield and dose on read (never stored).

lot_id.title: Lot Id
lot_id.description: Optional: the physical lot this brew came from (must belong to the bean).

brewed_at.title: Brewed At
brewed_at.description: When it was brewed (defaults to now).

BrewUpdate.title: BrewUpdate
BrewUpdate.description: Partial update. bean_id/method_id are immutable after creation.

strength.title: Strength
strength.description: TDS band: below / within / above target.

extraction.title: Extraction
extraction.description: Extraction-yield band: below / within / above target.

ExtractionDiagnosticsRead.title: ExtractionDiagnosticsRead
ExtractionDiagnosticsRead.description: Where the brew sits on the brewing control chart.

message.title: Message
examples: If that email is registered, a reset link is on its way.

Message.title: Message
Message.description: A human-readable outcome, for endpoints with nothing else to return.

email.title: Email
email.description: Email address of the account to recover.

RecoverPassword.title: RecoverPassword
RecoverPassword.description: Payload for requesting a password-reset link.

token.title: Token
token.description: Token from the emailed reset link.

new_password.title: New Password
new_password.description: The new plaintext password (8-128 chars); stored hashed.

ResetPassword.title: ResetPassword
ResetPassword.description: Payload for spending a reset token on a new password.

country.title: Country
country.description: Country the roaster is based in.

city.title: City
city.description: City the roaster is based in.

source_id.title: Source Id
source_id.description: Roaster to merge away: its beans move to the target and it is deleted.

country.description: Country the roaster is based in.

name.title: Name

RoasterUpdate.title: RoasterUpdate
RoasterUpdate.description: All fields optional; only provided fields are applied (PATCH semantics).

TastingUpdate.title: TastingUpdate
TastingUpdate.description: Partial update; only provided fields are applied (PATCH semantics).

username.title: Username
username.description: Login handle (unique). Lowercase letters, digits, and . _ - only.

password.title: Password
password.description: Plaintext password (8-128 chars); stored hashed. Omit to email the user an invite so they set their own.

UserCreate.title: UserCreate
UserCreate.description: Payload for creating a user (admin-only). New users default to role 'user'.

UserRead.title: UserRead
UserRead.description: Public representation of a user (never exposes the password hash).

UserUpdate.title: UserUpdate
UserUpdate.description: Admin-editable user fields: rename, promote/demote and activate/deactivate.
